surfaces.label: Member Shop
notes: Buying also requires sign-in and a connected gym wallet.

surfaces.label: Wallet
notes: Top-ups also require sign-in and a connected gym.

surfaces.label: Purchases
notes: Shows marketplace receipts and token top-ups.

surfaces.label: Timer Library
notes: Owned timer packs can be viewed here.
Import/remix also requires a member plan or the feature:premium_timers unlock.

surfaces.label: Member Account Billing
notes: Portal launch also needs a Stripe customer mirror or a recent session id.

surfaces.label: Business Billing
notes: Portal launch also needs a tenant selection and mirrored customer id.

surfaces.label: Admin Status
notes: This page should go fully green before announcing a real deploy.

surfaces.label: Admin Execute
notes: Use together with /admin/wiring/ during staging and production cutover.

surfaces.label: Public Member Pricing
notes: Public page can render without auth, but direct checkout only becomes live when billing and price ids are ready.

surfaces.label: Public Business Pricing
notes: Business pricing now routes into setup instead of staying a dead brochure page.

surfaces.label: Public Business Start Flow
notes: Start flow collects tenant slug/name and can hand signed-in admins into checkout when runtime is safe.
